result.stdout:
pha-tomb <options> <source-file>

Options:
  --version, -v          Print compiler version
  --help, -h             Show help
  protocol:<number>      Target protocol version
  output:<directory>     Output directory
  libpath:<directory>    Additional library search path
  debug                  Enable debug output artifacts
  nativecheck:<mode>     Native/foundational interop checks (off|warn|error)

commands.payload:
pha-tomb <options> <source-file>

Options:
  --version, -v          Print compiler version
  --help, -h             Show help
  protocol:<number>      Target protocol version
  output:<directory>     Output directory
  libpath:<directory>    Additional library search path
  debug                  Enable debug output artifacts
  nativecheck:<mode>     Native/foundational interop checks (off|warn|error)
